title: Rabbit Villagers
body:
Rabbit Villagers is a pack that remodels Villagers into cute bunnies along with Illagers into Foxes!

For the full version, get it on my kofi!

OptiFine OR ETF/EMF mods Required

Tutorial:

Due to OptiFine having inconsistent updates and features, its recommended to use mods: EMF & ETF instead

If using OptiFine, make sure to enable these settings for complete features:

Video Settings -> Quality -> Custom Entity Models: ON
Random Entities -> ON
Emissive Textures -> ON
In order to prevent texture issues, Rabbit Villagers should be at the TOP of your Resource Pack list.
